case_title: HUJAZI, MONICA vs. COWLING, WHITNEY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUJAZI, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT COWLING, WHITNEY MOOREHEAD, JARVIS HUSOME, PAUL DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF APR-23-1996, SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND FOR REASONS IN THE DEMURRER. CCP 430.10(E) & (F).

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-13-1997, CONTINUED TO FEB-26-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 CONTINUED PURSUANT TO COURT INSTRUCTIONS UNLESS A DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION HAS BEEN FILED, OR JUDGMENT ENTERED, THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR AT THE STATUS CONFERENCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT MOOREHEAD, JARVIS HUSOME, PAUL HEARING SET FOR APR-23-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS BY JUDGE DESMOND #2 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUJAZI, MONICA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OPPOSITION DEMURRER BY DEFTS. JARVIS MOOREHEAD AND PAUL HUSOME TO COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUJAZI, MONICA
ADDED TO UNLAWFUL DETAINER STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-13-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-26-1997, DISMISSAL DISMISS WITHOUR PREJUDICE. COURT WILL DISMISS CASE AT 2/26/97 STATUS CONFERENCE BASED ON THE COURT'S 4/23/96 ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE. APPEARANCE ON 2/26/97 IS NOT REQUIRED.
